name: Shopify VIP Loyalty Trigger
description: When a Shopify order is created, pulls the customer's lifetime spend, compares it to a VIP threshold, and for VIPs upgrades the customer in Klaviyo, generates a one-time discount code, emails them a thank-you with the code, and posts to a #vip-orders Slack channel. Replaces the manual segmentation, code-creation, and notification work merch teams do by hand.
